inputs.label: Cost of Attendance
inputs.businessContext: Total annual cost including tuition, fees, books, and living expenses.

inputs.label: Annual Family Income
inputs.businessContext: Total adjusted gross income of the family.

inputs.label: Number of Dependents
inputs.businessContext: Number of family members financially dependent (including the student).

inputs.label: Total Assets
inputs.businessContext: Total value of cash, savings, investments, and other assets.

inputs.label: Other Financial Aid
inputs.businessContext: Other scholarships, grants, or aid already awarded.
